hook-tool-use.notes: Can approve, deny, or defer.; Post: postToolUse event. Fires on success or failure.

hook-response-tracking.notes: No notification hook. errorOccurred event exists but doesn't map to notification.

version_notes.0.0.402: Plugins can provide session lifecycle hooks.

mcp-streamable-http.notes: HTTP transport listed but unclear if fully conformant with MCP streamable-http spec.

mcp-tools.notes: Only MCP primitive supported by the cloud agent.

mcp-resources.notes: Supported in VS Code IDE but not in the cloud agent.

mcp-prompts.notes: IDE only via /mcp.server.prompt. Not available in cloud agent.

mcp-sampling.notes: MCP servers can request model sampling with user approval.

version_notes.1.0.13: Added MCP sampling with an explicit user approval prompt.

mcp-elicitation.notes: The CLI and SDK expose structured elicitation dialogs and callbacks.

version_notes.1.0.14: SDK participants can respond to pending elicitation requests.

mcp-oauth.notes: OAuth 2.0 with automatic token management, refresh, and headless device-code support.

mcp-config-user.notes: Cloud agent has no user-level config.

user-instructions.notes: Personal instructions on GitHub.com. Highest priority. Not in IDEs.

org-instructions.notes: Managed settings exist, but an organization-scoped instruction file for the local CLI is not documented.

path-scoped-rules.notes: .github/instructions/NAME.instructions.md with applyTo glob frontmatter. excludeAgent support.

instruction-imports.notes: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and Copilot instruction files support @-style imports.

version_notes.1.0.66: Added @-style imports across supported instruction files.

agents-md-compat.notes: Reads AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and GEMINI.md from repo as instruction sources.

auto-memory.notes: Public preview. Auto-discovers repo conventions. Memories expire after 28 days if not validated. Cross-tool.

conversation-resume.notes: CLI /resume for previous sessions. Cloud agent sessions trackable.

context-compaction.notes: CLI auto-compacts at ~80% context. Manual /compact available.

shell-execution.notes: Runs in GitHub Actions (cloud) or terminal (CLI).

background-monitor.notes: Detached shell commands can be inspected and stopped; completion notifications are supported.

scheduled-tasks.notes: The /after and /every commands schedule one-shot and recurring prompts.

web-search.notes: Bing-powered. Disabled by default, must enable in settings.

web-fetch.notes: web_fetch tool retrieves URL content as markdown.

image-input.notes: Screenshots, sketches via drag-and-drop in issues or chat.

image-generation.notes: No image generation. Can generate HTML/CSS but no image files.

browser-control.notes: Built-in Playwright MCP server. Interact with web apps, validate UI.

lsp-integration.notes: The local CLI exposes LSP tools and loads plugin-contributed language servers.

semantic-search.notes: No embedding-based code search is documented; the CLI uses indexed grep and glob search.

subagent-spawning.notes: Custom agents as subagents with own context. CLI parallel agents. handoffs property.

task-management.notes: Built-in Task tools and subagents manage parallel work.

hook-shell-control.notes: Via generic preToolUse, no dedicated shell hook or matchers

hook-file-access.notes: Via generic preToolUse, no dedicated file hook

hook-mcp-control.notes: Generic PreToolUse and PostToolUse hooks can match MCP tool calls.
